Aluminium window and sliding door repairs in Petone

Petone jobs often involve wind, salt and older hardware. We repair aluminium windows and doors so they seal, latch and slide properly again.

Common jobs we book in Petone

People in Petone usually find us when searching for aluminium window repairs, ranchslider repairs, aluminium joinery repairs, leaking aluminium windows, window handles, door handles, window locks and lock picking. The most common issues we see are salt-affected hardware, seized locks and cylinders, slider leaks during bad weather.

Popular repair pages for Petone

  • Sliding / ranchslider door repairs
  • Aluminium window repairs
  • Aluminium joinery repairs
  • Mitre and sill reseal for leaks
  • Awning stays and hinges
  • Handles, locks, wedges and hardware
  • Lock picking and lockout entry in Petone

Best for

Sliding doors that drag, aluminium windows that no longer latch, broken stays, worn locks and recurring draught or leak problems.

What we repair

Rollers, tracks, stays, hinges, handles, Yale hardware, wedges, seals, mitred corners and sill leak paths on older and newer aluminium joinery.

How to book

Send your suburb, a short description and photos if you have them. We usually reply the same day during business hours.
